title: Keep Inventory Control
description: Gives you control over which types of items to keep and which to drop when a player dies.
body:
# Keep Inventory Control Keep Inventory Control is a fabric mod that gives you control over which types of items will be kept and which dropped when a player dies.

## Usage & Commands Whitelisted items are **kept** upon death if `keepInventory` gamerule is set to `false`. Blacklisted items are **dropped** upon death if `keepInventory` gamerule is set to `true`. Item lists are universal for each player and can only be modified by the server owner / an operator (if in multiplayer). `/keepinvcontrol info` shows general information about the usage of the mod. `/keepinvcontrol add ` to add an item to whitelist or blacklist. `/keepinvcontrol remove ` to remove an item from whitelist or blacklist. `/keepinvcontrol addxp` to add experience to whitelist or blacklist. `/keepinvcontrol removexp` to remove experience from whitelist or blacklist. `/keepinvcontrol list` shows all listed items. ##
